x4freetext: Silicon surface barrier detectors of 500 mu-m
Targets of about 100 mu-g/cm2 were prepared by vacuum
evaporation of enriched metallic tellurium and oxide
of tin and cadmium onto 20 mu-g/cm2 carbon foils.
